title: Strait of Hormuz Watch
text: Watch for oil price implications at the open after Iran closed the Strait of Hormuz, potentially affecting USD and global markets.
evidence: Iran says that Strait of Hormuz is closed once again
Oil price signals path into ceasefire cliff

title: AUD/USD Setup
text: Watch for a potential squeeze in AUD/USD at the open, given the extreme short bias in retail sentiment.
evidence: Retail heavily positioned, watch for squeeze

title: USD/JPY Correlation Break
text: Monitor the USD/JPY vs VIX correlation break, which may indicate a shift in JPY's safe-haven status, at the open.
evidence: JPY no longer acting as safe haven

title: Yield Curve Regime
text: Note the bull flattener yield curve regime, which may influence CB divergence signals and cross-asset risk narrative at the open.

title: Central Bank Policy Rates
text: Be aware of the upcoming central bank meetings, including the Fed, ECB, and BoJ, which may impact market expectations at the open.
